style_name: 中电联政企清爽专业风
best_for: 中电联模板下的正式政企汇报、政策方案、平台建设方案、运营方案、专项研究和领导汇报正文页
visual_direction: clean government-enterprise reporting deck, authoritative and restrained, white or near-white field, deep-blue hierarchy, high-readability Chinese text, structured policy/platform/operation diagrams, clear evidence-oriented layout

canvas.background: white #FFFFFF, near-white #F8FAFC, or very pale blue #F6F9FF; text-bearing areas must be pure white or near-white without texture
canvas.composition: formal report content zone with stable grid, clear grouped modules, hierarchy-first diagram, and concise evidence callouts
canvas.density: medium to medium-high information density, organized by alignment, grouping, numbering, and whitespace instead of fading text

color_palette.primary: official deep blue #123B66, #0B3A75, or #1D4ED8 for section headers, key connectors, and hierarchy anchors
color_palette.text_primary: 正文主色必须使用深墨蓝或深灰: #0F172A, #111827, or #1E293B
color_palette.text_secondary: 次级说明文字不得浅于 #334155; avoid #64748B or lighter as body text
color_palette.secondary: muted teal #0F766E or restrained cyan #0369A1 only for secondary relationship markers
color_palette.accent: soft amber #B45309 or #D97706 only for warnings, risk, or one key emphasis; keep under 5%
color_palette.neutral: border #CBD5E1 or #D7E1EE, card background #FFFFFF or #F8FAFC, muted area background #F1F5F9
color_palette.rule: prioritize readable dark text on light carriers; keep blues restrained and official; avoid low-contrast gray-blue body text, translucent text, blue-purple glow, neon, luxury gold, heavy dark panels, and marketing-style gradients

typography.title: clear bold modern Chinese sans-serif, report-like, authoritative, close to Microsoft YaHei / PingFang SC
typography.body: high-readability modern Chinese sans-serif, regular-medium weight or stronger, left-aligned when possible
typography.labels: small labels must remain dark and readable; no thin, pale, or semi-transparent labels
typography.text_quality: Chinese text must be exact, crisp, high-contrast, and readable after image compression

font_rules: 中文文字采用接近微软雅黑特征的现代中文无衬线风格，字形端正清晰，笔画均匀，结构略圆润，字面宽度适中偏宽，字距自然，行距宽松稳定。
正文主色必须使用深墨蓝或深灰（优先 #0F172A、#111827、#1E293B），次级说明文字不得浅于 #334155；禁止使用 #64748B 或更浅颜色作为正文主文字。
文字与承载面视觉对比度不得低于 4.5:1；小字号、注释、图例和标签应更接近 7:1。正文必须落在纯白或近白承载面上，不得压在渐变、纹理、阴影、高光或发光区域上。
标题条可用政务深蓝或中电联深蓝，白字必须加粗且边缘清晰；禁止在深蓝标题条上使用发灰白字、半透明字或过强阴影。
正文至少采用 regular-medium 字重，关键短语采用 semibold；禁止细体、半透明文字、低对比浅灰字、密排小字和压缩字形。
文字不得贴边、挤压、溢出，不得使用过窄行高。常规文字容器应保留充足留白，左右内边距不低于10%，上下内边距不低于8%。
正文模块标题约 14–16pt，标签约 11–12pt，辅助说明约 9–10pt；如信息密度较高，优先减少装饰和重组内容，不得通过降低文字颜色或缩小字重来制造轻盈感。
layout_patterns: policy / platform / capability / market relationship map
formal evidence slide with conclusion and constraints
operating model with public-service and market-service tracks
layout_usage_rule: Use layout_blueprints as candidate starting points only. Choose and adapt the composition according to each slide's semantic role; avoid repeating the same blueprint on adjacent slides unless it is a deliberate repeated sequence. Prefer flat or semi-flat report diagrams over large 3D pedestal scenes when content is policy, governance, operation, or compliance heavy.

labels: 边界 / 约束 / 保障
数据来源 / 主体输入
可信加工 / 规则运营
服务产品 / 用户结果

visual_elements.allowed: formal grids, layered blocks, process arrows, responsibility matrices, evidence cards, numbered tags, restrained icons, light line diagrams, policy-document and platform motifs, low-saturation semantic mini-illustrations at module edges
visual_elements.avoid: large decorative 3D pedestals, excessive glow, translucent glass cards under text, random stock photos, cute stickers, dense unreadable tables, marketing poster layout

rendering_constraints: The image must look suitable for a real China Electricity Council formal government-enterprise reporting deck.
Prioritize readability, authority, evidence, logical flow, and professional restraint over decoration.
All readable text must be dark, crisp, and separated from decorative graphics.
Keep the overall page light and clean, but never make text light gray, semi-transparent, or low contrast.
